Liu Ba, styledZichu, was fromZhengyang[烝陽],Lingling[零陵].
He had a renowned reputation when he was young.ATheGovernorofJing province[荊州牧],Liu Biao, repeatedly recruited him and he was also nominated asOutstanding Talent, all of which he did not accept [荊州]. When[Liu] Biaodied,Excellency Caowent on an expedition againstJing province[荊州]. TheFormer Lordfled to theJiangnan region[江南] and many scholars of theJingchu region[荊楚] followed him like clouds [gathering].[Liu] Bawent north toExcellency Cao.Excellency Caorecruited him to serve as abureaucrat. He was dispatched to attract and admitChangsha[長沙],Lingling[零陵], andGuiyang[桂陽].BIt happened thatFormer Lordcaptured those three commanderies, and[Liu] Bawas unable to report back his mission. He then went afar intoJiaozhi[交阯].CTheFormer Lordthus was deeply resentful.[Liu] Balater arrived in Shu [蜀] fromJiaozhi[交阯].DSoon after, theFormer LordsettledYi province[益州].[Liu] Baapologized for his crimes and faults, and theFormer Lorddid not rebuke him.EZhugeKongmingrecommended him several times, so theFormer Lordrecruited him to serve asbureaucrat of the Western Bureauunder theGeneral of the Left.F
